postmark.Subject: 3rd mortgage — Marcus Webb
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Third mortgage for Marcus Webb at 1142 Tory Road NW, Edmonton, AB T6R 2K8.

1st mortgage: Scotiabank, balance $380,000 (statement attached).
2nd mortgage: Centum Private Capital Inc., balance $85,000.
New 3rd mortgage request: $50,000.

Combined LTV: 71.5% ($515k / $720k). Borrower needs the 3rd to cover renovation overruns; 1st and 2nd both current.
